master_plan.analysis: v47 ranks 6th of 30 (rating 1235.6, rd 75.8) with only 290 games — H2H data is unreliable at 10 games/opponent. Match analysis across the pool identifies TWO structural leaks: (1) ZERO postflop folding — the bot NEVER folds after seeing the flop, paying off every value bet with weak holdings, causing -15k chip losses; (2) Excessive river all-in frequency (22-35%) for non-premium hands, creating catastrophic pot explosions.
master_plan.targeted_failure: ZERO postflop fold rate on flop/turn/river — the bot pays off every bet with weak holdings (bottom pair, underpair, ace-high). Root cause: simulation win_rate (computed vs full opponent range) overestimates equity by 10-15% when facing bets.
master_plan.expected_behavior_change: (1) Bot folds weak hands when facing >0.5x pot bets on turn/river with unfavorable pot odds. Expected fold rate increases from 0% to 10-20%. (2) River all-in frequency for non-premium hands drops from 22-35% to <12%. (3) BB-vs-limp iso-raise actually fires (typo fixed).
